title: Underground Castle - Custom Mario Level
description: I've made plenty of levels now and am starting on my own world called 'Garrett's Revenge' (Have to call it something.) Eventually I would like to put it up for download using an .ips file of course. With the levels I can make today, makes my old levels look like crap. This is one of the fortresses in my world. There are more levels, and some are more fun and more tactical than this one!
